text.title: User Interviews Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers?

branch.question: Is informed consent for recording + AI processing obtainable?
Is recruitment ≥5 per relevant segment reachable?

conclusion.verdict: apply: write research questions first; produce reviewed guide; record; sanitise; synthesise with quote citations.
defer until per-segment n >= 5; partial study cannot saturate themes.
block: cannot proceed without consent for recording + AI processing.
do not apply this methodology in this context; route to the correct one or skip.

text.example: Applies-If holds, consent obtained, recruitment ≥5/segment → produce guide per r1-research-vs-interview-questions; quote-cited insights per r7-quote-cited-insights; sanitised transcripts per r8-sanitise-before-llm.
